hooks.command:
echo "
[CareerOS Memory] Session ending. Before you close:
  1. Write session digest → .obsidian-ai-memory/01-SESSIONS/YYYY-MM-DD/session-HHMM-claude.md
  2. Append any bug fixes → 03-ERRORS/error-memory.md
  3. Append any decisions → 04-DECISIONS/decisions.md
  4. Update active-goals.md checkboxes if goals completed
  5. Run: git add .obsidian-ai-memory/ && git commit -m 'memory: $(date +%Y-%m-%d) session digest'
  See .obsidian-ai-memory/MEMORY-WRITE-PROTOCOL.md for the full protocol."
echo "[CareerOS] Running Bash tool — ensure memory was read at session start (MEMORY-READ-PROTOCOL.md)"
